final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] in,
    input [2:0] shift_amount,
    input direction,
    output reg [7:0] out
);always @(*) begin
        if (direction == 0) begin // left shift
            out = in << shift_amount;
        end else begin // right shift
            out = in >> shift_amount;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= in & ~shift_amount;
    end
  end

endmodule
